title: Welcome to Your Journal
gratitude: Having a quiet moment to write
Hot tea on a cool evening
highlight: Today I started my journal and it already feels like a good idea.
content:
## Hello, Journal!

This is your cozy corner for daily reflections, dreams, and everything in between.

### How it works

- **Write freely** — each entry is your space. Use the title, mood, and content however feels natural.
- **Track your mood** — pick from amazing / good / okay / meh / rough, or add a custom emoji.
- **Gratitude list** — jot down things you appreciate. Even tiny ones count.
- **Writing prompts** — stuck? Grab a prompt from the Prompts tab for inspiration.
- **Tags** — organize entries by theme: personal, work, travel, dreams, and more.

### Tips

- There is no right way to journal. Short entries count just as much as long ones.
- Try the "highlight" field for a one-sentence summary of your day.
- Look back at your mood calendar to notice patterns over time.
